name: OperationalHubProfile
description: Profile document for Operational Hubs that manages operator team assignment and subteam relationships

modules.name: configuration

operations.name: setOperationalHubName
operations.template: Set the name of the operational hub
operations.description: Set the name of the operational hub

operations.name: setOperatorTeam
operations.template: Set the operator team PHID for this operational hub
operations.description: Set the operator team PHID for this operational hub

operations.name: addSubteam
operations.template: Add a subteam (builder profile) to the operational hub
operations.description: Add a subteam (builder profile) to the operational hub

operations.name: removeSubteam
operations.template: Remove a subteam from the operational hub
operations.description: Remove a subteam from the operational hub

modules.description: Operations for configuring the operational hub profile
